controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to respective circulars/ notifications for detailed information
controls.control_description: The Authorised Persons may refer to respective circulars/ notifications for detailed information, if so needed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to respective circulars/ notifications for detailed information

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description: It may be noted that whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description: The Master Direction issued herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure 06, 2026
controls.control_description:
This document contains the various instructions relating to the subject of money
changing activities including functioning of Full Fledged Money Changers (FFMCs),
non-bank Authorised Dealers Category-II as well as the conduct of foreign exchange
transactions with their customers/constituents.3
3 Para 1 of Section I modified on May 06, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 06, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry on money changing business without the possession of a valid money changer's licence issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description: No person shall carry on money changing business without the possession of a valid money changer's licence issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry on money changing business without the possession of a valid money changer's licence issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure an authorised dealer, money changer, off-shore banking unit or any other person authorised under sub-section (1) of section 10 to deal in foreign exch
controls.control_description:
Definitions

2.1 Authorised Person means an authorised dealer, money changer, off-shore banking unit or any other person authorised under sub-section (1) of section 10 to deal in foreign exchange or foreign securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an authorised dealer, money changer, off-shore banking unit or any other person authorised under sub-section (1) of section 10 to deal in foreign exch

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person authorised as an authorised dealer under sub-section (1) of section 10 of fema
controls.control_description: 2.2 'Authorised Dealer' (AD) means a person authorised as an authorised dealer under sub-section (1) of section 10 of FEMA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person authorised as an authorised dealer under sub-section (1) of section 10 of fema

controls.control_objective: To ensure include (i) upgraded ffmcs
controls.control_description:
2.3 'Authorised Dealer (AD) Category I' means entities which are authorised by the Reserve Bank to carry out all permissible current and capital account transactions as per directions issued from time- to-time

2.4 'Authorised Dealer (AD) Category II' means entities which are authorised by the Reserve Bank to carry out specified non-trade related current account transactions, all the activities permitted to Full Fledged Money Changers and any other activity as decided by the Reserve Bank, and shall include (i) Upgraded FFMCs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include (i) upgraded ffmcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities which are authorised by the reserve bank to carry out specific foreign exchange transactions incidental to their business / activities
controls.control_description: 2.5 'Authorised Dealer (AD) Category III' means entities which are authorised by the Reserve Bank to carry out specific foreign exchange transactions incidental to their business / activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities which are authorised by the reserve bank to carry out specific foreign exchange transactions incidental to their business / activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint franchisees, at their option, for the purpose of carrying restricted money changing business i
controls.control_description: Note: Authorised Dealer Category-I Banks/ Authorised Dealers Category-II/ FFMCs may appoint franchisees, at their option, for the purpose of carrying restricted money changing business i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint franchisees, at their option, for the purpose of carrying restricted money changing business i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated as per the following
controls.control_description:
(b) The minimum Net Owned Funds (NOF) required for consideration as FFMC are as follows:
Category Minimum NOF Single branch FFMC Rs.25 lakh Multiple branch FFMC Rs.50 lakh Note: The Net Owned Funds of applicants, other than banks, should be calculated as per the following.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated as per the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted through the apconnect application (https://apconnect
controls.control_description:
(ii) Documentation Application in the prescribed form should be submitted through the APConnect application (https://apconnect.rbi.org.in/entity) to the respective Regional Office of the Foreign Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the applicant falls, along with the following documents:

(a) Copy of the Certificate of Incorporation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted through the apconnect application (https://apconnect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank before commencement of the business
controls.control_description: (f) On obtaining approval from the Reserve Bank, a copy of the registration under Shops & Establishment Act or any other documentary evidence such as rent receipt, copy of lease agreement, etc., should be submitted to the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank before commencement of the business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank before commencement of the business

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence its operations within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the regional office concerned of the reserve ban
controls.control_description: (g) The FFMC should commence its operations within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence its operations within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the regional office concerned of the reserve ban

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out their activities as per the instructions specified in sections v and vi below and other instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to
controls.control_description: (h) The new FFMCs should carry out their activities as per the instructions specified in SECTIONS V and VI below and other instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out their activities as per the instructions specified in sections v and vi below and other instructions issued by the reserve bank from time to

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry on money changing business at any additional place of business other than its permanent place of business except with the prior approval of the
controls.control_description: No FFMC/non-bank AD Category II shall carry on money changing business at any additional place of business other than its permanent place of business except with the prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry on money changing business at any additional place of business other than its permanent place of business except with the prior approval of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply 3through the apconnect application to the respective regional office of the foreign exchange department under whose jurisdiction the registered
controls.control_description: An FFMC/non-bank AD Category II which intends to commence money changing business at any additional place of business shall apply 3through the APConnect application to the respective Regional Office of the Foreign Exchange Department under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the applicant falls and the Reserve Bank may approve the additional place of business subject to such conditions as deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply 3through the apconnect application to the respective regional office of the foreign exchange department under whose jurisdiction the registered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be diversified and should be meeting the demand of tourists, etc
controls.control_description: It is expected that branches of Authorised Persons should be diversified and should be meeting the demand of tourists, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be diversified and should be meeting the demand of tourists, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by the following:- (a) a certificate from proprietor/partner/director /cfo of the entity as regards the position of nof
controls.control_description:
Applications for additional locations (places of business) should be accompanied by the following:-

(a) A certificate from Proprietor/Partner/Director /CFO of the entity as regards the position of NOF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by the following:- (a) a certificate from proprietor/partner/director /cfo of the entity as regards the position of nof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to any ffmc/non-bank ad category-ii, against whom any major doe / dri case is pending
controls.control_description: Note: No new branch licence shall be issued to any FFMC/non-bank AD Category-II, against whom any major DoE / DRI case is pending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to any ffmc/non-bank ad category-ii, against whom any major doe / dri case is pending

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be submitted
controls.control_description: However, in case there is a change, a copy of the revised / latest version of the policy shall be required to be submitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be submitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank before commencement of business at an additional branch
controls.control_description: A copy of the registration under Shops & Establishment Act or any other documentary evidence such as rent receipt, copy of lease agreement, etc., should be submitted to the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank before commencement of business at an additional branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank before commencement of business at an additional branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence operations of its additional branch within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the regional office concern
controls.control_description: The FFMC/ non-bank AD Category II should commence operations of its additional branch within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence operations of its additional branch within a period of six months from the date of issuance of licence and inform the regional office concern

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following conditions
controls.control_description: For opening Foreign Exchange Counters/branches/) at the international airports in India, AD Category-I banks/ ADs Category - II/ FFMCs should adhere to following conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to following conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure ideally be established after the customs desk (green channel/red channel)
controls.control_description: (a) Foreign Exchange Counters/branches in the arrival halls in international airports in India shall ideally be established after the Customs Desk (Green Channel/Red Channel).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ideally be established after the customs desk (green channel/red channel)

controls.control_objective: To ensure only purchase foreign currency and sell indian rupees (inr) and "encashment certificates" shall invariable be issued by the money changers to the cust
controls.control_description: However, Foreign Exchange Counters may also be established between the Immigration Desk and the Customs Desk in international airports in India subject to the condition that these counters shall only purchase foreign currency and sell Indian Rupees (INR) and "Encashment Certificates" shall invariable be issued by the money changers to the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only purchase foreign currency and sell indian rupees (inr) and "encashment certificates" shall invariable be issued by the money changers to the cust

controls.control_objective: To ensure also sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the regional office concerned of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
However, franchisees of AD Category - I / AD Category - II / FFMCs
functioning within 10 kms from the borders of Pakistan and Bangladesh may also
sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the Regional
Office concerned of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the regional office concerned of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into any fresh franchisee arrangements henceforth, and the existing franchisee arrangements shall be discontinued gradually, in any case within
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding anything
contained in these directions, an authorised person shall not enter into any fresh
franchisee arrangements henceforth, and the existing franchisee arrangements shall
be discontinued gradually, in any case within two years from May 6, 2026.7
Note: Obtaining of Conduct Certificate of the franchisee from the local police authorities is optional for the franchisers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into any fresh franchisee arrangements henceforth, and the existing franchisee arrangements shall be discontinued gradually, in any case within

controls.control_objective: To ensure take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as franchisees who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforc
controls.control_description: However, the franchisers may take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as franchisees who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforcing agencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take due care to avoid appointing individuals/ entities as franchisees who have cases / proceedings initiated / pending against them by any law enforc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done on a regular basis, at least once in a year
controls.control_description: The above checks should be done on a regular basis, at least once in a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done on a regular basis, at least once in a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain from the franchisees proper documentary evidence confirming the location of the franchisees in addition to personal visits to the site
controls.control_description:
The
franchiser should obtain from the franchisees proper documentary evidence
confirming the location of the franchisees in addition to personal visits to the site.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain from the franchisees proper documentary evidence confirming the location of the franchisees in addition to personal visits to the site

controls.control_objective: To ensure also obtain a chartered accountant's certificate confirming the new franchisee agreements are entered into, these would have to be reported (through t
controls.control_description:
The franchiser should also obtain a Chartered Accountant's certificate confirming the
new franchisee agreements are entered into, these would have to be reported (through the APConnect application by non-bank AD Category-II and FFMCs) to the Reserve Bank in Form RMC- F on a post-facto basis along with similar declaration as indicated above."
maintenance of minimum Net Owned Funds of the franchisee, i.e., Rs.10 lakh on an
ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also obtain a chartered accountant's certificate confirming the new franchisee agreements are entered into, these would have to be reported (through t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established before the customs desk or the immigration desk, whichever comes first
controls.control_description: (b) Foreign Exchange Counters/branches in the departure halls in international airports in India shall be established before the Customs Desk or the immigration desk, whichever comes first.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established before the customs desk or the immigration desk, whichever comes first

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow residents (along with non-residents) to exchange indian rupee notes
controls.control_description: However, the Foreign Exchange Counters established in the Duty-Free Area or Security Hold Area beyond the Immigration or Customs desk shall allow residents (along with non-residents) to exchange Indian Rupee notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow residents (along with non-residents) to exchange indian rupee notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the para given below at (c) and (d)
controls.control_description: The limits of carrying Indian Rupees by residents and non-residents shall be as per the para given below at (c) and (d).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the para given below at (c) and (d)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the regional office concerned of the reserve bank
controls.control_description: However, franchisees of AD Category - I / AD Category - II / FFMCs functioning within 10 kms from the borders of Pakistan and Bangladesh may also sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the Regional Office concerned of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also sell the currency of the bordering country, with the prior approval of the regional office concerned of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the following salient features:
controls.control_description:
The Agency / Franchisee agreement to be entered into should include the following
salient features:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the following salient features:

controls.control_objective: To ensure display the names of their franchisers, exchange rates and that they are authoried only to purchase foreign currency, prominently in their offices
controls.control_description:
(a) The franchisees should display the names of their franchisers, exchange
rates and that they are authoried only to purchase foreign currency,
prominently in their offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display the names of their franchisers, exchange rates and that they are authoried only to purchase foreign currency, prominently in their offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the same or close to the daily exchange rate charged by the ad category - i banks / ads category - ii / ffmc at its branches
controls.control_description:
Exchange Rate for conversion of foreign currency
into Rupees should be the same or close to the daily exchange rate charged
by the AD Category - I Banks / ADs Category - II / FFMC at its branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the same or close to the daily exchange rate charged by the ad category - i banks / ads category - ii / ffmc at its branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be surrendered only to its franchiser within 7 working days from the date of purchase
controls.control_description:
(b) The foreign currency purchased by the franchisee should be surrendered only
to its franchiser within 7 working days from the date of purchase.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be surrendered only to its franchiser within 7 working days from the date of purchase

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at least once a year
controls.control_description:
(d) The on-site inspection of the franchisee by the franchiser should be
conducted at least once a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at least once a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply 5(non-bank ad category -ii and ffmcs should apply through the apconnect application) to the respective regional office of the reserve bank, in f
controls.control_description:
Procedure for application

An AD Category - I Bank / AD Category - II/ FFMC should apply 5(non-bank AD Category -II and FFMCs should apply through the APConnect application) to the respective Regional Office of the Reserve Bank, in Form RMC-F for appointment of franchisees under this Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply 5(non-bank ad category -ii and ffmcs should apply through the apconnect application) to the respective regional office of the reserve bank, in f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by a declaration that while selecting the franchisees, adequate due diligence has been carried out and that such entities have undertak
controls.control_description: The application should be accompanied by a declaration that while selecting the franchisees, adequate due diligence has been carried out and that such entities have undertaken to comply with all the provisions of the franchising agreement and prevailing Reserve Bank regulations regarding money changing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by a declaration that while selecting the franchisees, adequate due diligence has been carried out and that such entities have undertak

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the following minimum checks while conducting due diligence of its franchisees: i
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I Bank/ AD Category-II / FFMC should undertake the
following minimum checks while conducting due diligence of its franchisees:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the following minimum checks while conducting due diligence of its franchisees: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply
controls.control_description:
Encashment Certificate
Note: Instructions in the Master Direction - Liberalised Remittance Scheme (LRS) dated January 1, 2016 (updated from time to time), as applicable, shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue certificate of encashment when asked for in cases of purchases of foreign currency notes, coins and travellers cheques from residents as well as
controls.control_description:
(i) Authorised Persons may issue certificate of encashment when asked for in
cases of purchases of foreign currency notes, coins and travellers cheques from
residents as well as non-residents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue certificate of encashment when asked for in cases of purchases of foreign currency notes, coins and travellers cheques from residents as well as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued on the letter head of the money changer and proper record should be maintained
controls.control_description:
These certificates bearing authorised signatures
should be issued on the letter head of the money changer and proper record should
be maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued on the letter head of the money changer and proper record should be maintained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be drawn to the fact that unspent local currency held by non- residents will be allowed to be converted into foreign currency only against production
controls.control_description:
(ii) In cases where encashment certificate is not issued, attention of the
customers should be drawn to the fact that unspent local currency held by non-
residents will be allowed to be converted into foreign currency only against
production of a valid encashment certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be drawn to the fact that unspent local currency held by non- residents will be allowed to be converted into foreign currency only against production

controls.control_objective: To ensure purchase from other ffmcs and authorised dealers (ads) any foreign currency notes, coins and encashed traveller's cheques tendered in the normal cours
controls.control_description:
Purchases from other FFMCs and Authorised Dealers (ADs)
An FFMC/ non-bank AD Category II may purchase from other FFMCs and
Authorised Dealers (ADs) any foreign currency notes, coins and encashed traveller's
cheques tendered in the normal course of business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to purchase from other ffmcs and authorised dealers (ads) any foreign currency notes, coins and encashed traveller's cheques tendered in the normal cours

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid only by way of crossed account payee cheque/demand draft/banker's cheque / pay order/electronic funds transfer through banking channel
controls.control_description:
Rupee equivalent of the amount
of foreign exchange purchased should be paid only by way of crossed account
payee cheque/demand draft/banker's cheque / pay order/electronic funds transfer
through banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid only by way of crossed account payee cheque/demand draft/banker's cheque / pay order/electronic funds transfer through banking channel

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell foreign exchange up to the prescribed ceiling specified in schedule iii to the foreign exchange management (current account transaction) rules, 2
controls.control_description:
(I) Private Visits
Authorised Persons may sell foreign exchange up to the prescribed ceiling specified
in Schedule III to the Foreign Exchange Management (Current Account Transaction)
Rules, 2000 during a financial year to persons resident in India for undertaking one
or more private visits to any country abroad (except Nepal and Bhutan).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell foreign exchange up to the prescribed ceiling specified in schedule iii to the foreign exchange management (current account transaction) rules, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure sell foreign exchange to persons resident in india for undertaking business travel or for attending a conference or specialised training or for mainte
controls.control_description:
(II) Business visits
Authorised Persons may sell foreign exchange to persons resident in India for
undertaking business travel or for attending a conference or specialised training or
for maintenance expenses of a patient going abroad for medical treatment or check -
up abroad or for accompanying as attendant to a patient going abroad for medical
treatment / check-up up to the limits specified in Schedule III to FEMA (Current
Account Transactions) Rules, 2000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sell foreign exchange to persons resident in india for undertaking business travel or for attending a conference or specialised training or for mainte

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling on private/business visit abroad
controls.control_description:
(III) Forex Pre-paid Cards
Authorised Dealers Category-II may issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling
on private/business visit abroad, subject to KYC/AML/CFT requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling on private/business visit abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected through ad category-i banks only
controls.control_description:
However,
the settlement in respect of forex pre-paid cards shall be effected through AD
Category-I banks only.13
In this regard, it is clarified that prepaid foreign currency cards are a form of foreign
currency, similar to foreign currency notes or travellers cheques.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected through ad category-i banks only

controls.control_objective: To ensure to comply with the same rigorous standards of due diligence and kyc as they would in case they were selling foreign currency notes/ travellers cheques
controls.control_description:
As such, the
authorised dealers (ADs)/FFMCs selling pre-paid foreign currency cards for travel
purposes are required to comply with the same rigorous standards of due diligence
and KYC as they would in case they were selling foreign currency notes/ travellers
cheques to their customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to comply with the same rigorous standards of due diligence and kyc as they would in case they were selling foreign currency notes/ travellers cheques

controls.control_objective: To ensure 06, 2026
controls.control_description: 13 Para 5(III) of Section V modified on May 06, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 06, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling on private/business visit abroad
controls.control_description:
Prior to modification, it read as follows:

"Authorised Dealers Category-II may issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling on private/business visit abroad, subject to KYC/AML/CFT requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue forex pre-paid cards to residents travelling on private/business visit abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected through ad category-i banks
controls.control_description:
However, the settlement in respect of forex pre-paid cards may be effected through AD Category-I banks."
Conditions
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected through ad category-i banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified by the authorised persons while releasing foreign exchange
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank will not generally, prescribe the documents which should be
verified by the Authorised Persons while releasing foreign exchange.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified by the authorised persons while releasing foreign exchange

controls.control_objective: To ensure sign the cheques in the presence of an authorised official and the purchaser's acknowledgement for receipt of the travellers' cheques should be held o
controls.control_description:
In case of issue of travellers' cheques, the traveler should sign the cheques in
the presence of an authorised official and the purchaser's acknowledgement for
receipt of the travellers' cheques should be held on record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sign the cheques in the presence of an authorised official and the purchaser's acknowledgement for receipt of the travellers' cheques should be held o

controls.control_objective: To ensure release foreign exchange for travel purposes on the basis of a declaration given by the traveler regarding the amount of foreign exchange availed of d
controls.control_description:
Authorised Persons may release foreign exchange for travel purposes on the
basis of a declaration given by the traveler regarding the amount of foreign
exchange availed of during the financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release foreign exchange for travel purposes on the basis of a declaration given by the traveler regarding the amount of foreign exchange availed of d

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept payment in cash below rs
controls.control_description:
Authorised Persons may accept payment in cash below Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty
thousand only) against sale of foreign exchange for travel abroad (for private visit
or for any other purpose).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept payment in cash below rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be received only by a crossed cheque drawn on the applicant's bank account or crossed cheque drawn on the bank account of the firm sponsoring the visi
controls.control_description:
Wherever the sale of foreign exchange is for the
amount equivalent to Rs.50,000/- and above whether it involves a single drawal
or multiple drawals for a single journey, the payment must be received only by a
crossed cheque drawn on the applicant's bank account or crossed cheque drawn
on the bank account of the firm sponsoring the visit of the applicant or electronic
funds transfer through banking channel by applicant or sponsoring company or
banker's cheque / pay order / demand draft.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be received only by a crossed cheque drawn on the applicant's bank account or crossed cheque drawn on the bank account of the firm sponsoring the visi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also accept the payments made by the traveller through debit cards/ credit cards/ prepaid cards for travel abroad (for private visit or for any other
controls.control_description:
In addition to the payment by
Rupees/ through crossed cheque/ banker's cheque/ pay order/ demand
draft/electronic funds transfer through banking channel, Authorised Persons may
also accept the payments made by the traveller through debit cards/ credit cards/
prepaid cards for travel abroad (for private visit or for any other purpose)
provided- (i) KYC/ AML / CFT guidelines are complied with, (ii) sale of foreign
currency/ issue of foreign currency traveller's cheques is within the limits (credit/
prepaid cards) prescribed by the bank, (iii) the purchaser of foreign currency/
foreign currency travellers' cheque and the credit/ debit/ prepaid card holder is
one and the same person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also accept the payments made by the traveller through debit cards/ credit cards/ prepaid cards for travel abroad (for private visit or for any other

controls.control_objective: To ensure be restricted to the limits prescribed by the reserve bank from time to time for the country of visit of the traveller
controls.control_description:
The sale of foreign currency notes and coins within the overall entitlement of
foreign exchange should be restricted to the limits prescribed by the Reserve
Bank from time to time for the country of visit of the traveller.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be restricted to the limits prescribed by the reserve bank from time to time for the country of visit of the traveller

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert into foreign currency, unspent indian currency held by non-residents at the time of their departure from india
controls.control_description:
Sales against Reconversion of Indian Currency
Authorised Persons may convert into foreign currency, unspent Indian currency held
by non-residents at the time of their departure from India, provided a valid
Encashment Certificate is produced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert into foreign currency, unspent indian currency held by non-residents at the time of their departure from india

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert at their discretion, unspent indian currency up to rs
controls.control_description: Note (1): Authorised Persons may convert at their discretion, unspent Indian currency up to Rs.10,000 in the possession of non-residents if, for bonafide reasons, the person is unable to produce an Encashment Certificate after ensuring that the departure is scheduled to take place within the following seven days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert at their discretion, unspent indian currency up to rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide facility for reconversion of indian rupees to the extent of rs
controls.control_description: Note (2): ADs Category - I, ADs Category - II and FFMCs may provide facility for reconversion of Indian Rupees to the extent of Rs.50,000/- to foreign tourists (not NRIs) against ATM Receipts based on the following documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide facility for reconversion of indian rupees to the extent of rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure at each of its business place, display at a prominent place in or near the public counter, a copy of the money changing licence issued by reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Display of Money Changing Licence
An FFMC/ non-bank AD Category II should at each of its business place, display at
a prominent place in or near the public counter, a copy of the money changing
licence issued by Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at each of its business place, display at a prominent place in or near the public counter, a copy of the money changing licence issued by reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted as stock transfer and not as sales
controls.control_description:
Foreign Currency Balances
Note: Inter-branch transfer of foreign currencies should be accounted as stock transfer and not as sales.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accounted as stock transfer and not as sales

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep balances in foreign currencies at reasonable levels and avoid buildup of idle balances with a view to speculating on currency movements
controls.control_description:
(i) An FFMC/non-bank AD Category-II should keep balances in foreign
currencies at reasonable levels and avoid buildup of idle balances with a view to
speculating on currency movements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep balances in foreign currencies at reasonable levels and avoid buildup of idle balances with a view to speculating on currency movements

controls.control_objective: To ensure surrender foreign currency notes, coins and travellers' cheques purchased only to their franchisers within seven working days
controls.control_description:
(ii) Franchisees should surrender foreign currency notes, coins and travellers'
cheques purchased only to their franchisers within seven working days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to surrender foreign currency notes, coins and travellers' cheques purchased only to their franchisers within seven working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled by way of account payee crossed cheques / demand drafts/electronic funds transfer through banking channel
controls.control_description:
(iii) The transactions between authorised dealers and FFMCs should be settled
by way of account payee crossed cheques / demand drafts/electronic funds transfer
through banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled by way of account payee crossed cheques / demand drafts/electronic funds transfer through banking channel

controls.control_objective: To ensure settlement be made in cash
controls.control_description:
Under no circumstances should settlement be made in
cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settlement be made in cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain their normal business requirements of foreign currency notes from other ffmcs and authorised dealers (ads) in india, against payment in rupees
controls.control_description:
(i) FFMCs/non-bank ADs Category II may obtain their normal business
requirements of foreign currency notes from other FFMCs and Authorised Dealers
(ADs) in India, against payment in rupees made by way of account payee crossed
cheque / demand draft/electronic funds transfer through banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain their normal business requirements of foreign currency notes from other ffmcs and authorised dealers (ads) in india, against payment in rupees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 75% of the value of foreign currency notes purchased from other ffmcs/ ads, on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
15From
July 1, 2024, value of foreign currency notes sold by FFMCs / non-bank ADs
Category-II to the public for permitted purposes should not be less than 75% of the
value of foreign currency notes purchased from other FFMCs/ ADs, on a quarterly
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 75% of the value of foreign currency notes purchased from other ffmcs/ ads, on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained and made available for audit / inspection
controls.control_description:
Data of such sale and purchase should be maintained and made available for
audit / inspection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained and made available for audit / inspection

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ascertain the 'sale to public' requirement of the buying ffmcs/non-bank ads category ii, by seeking relevant data from such entities
controls.control_description:
FFMCs/ADs selling foreign currency may also ascertain the 'sale
to public' requirement of the buying FFMCs/non-bank ADs Category II, by seeking
relevant data from such entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ascertain the 'sale to public' requirement of the buying ffmcs/non-bank ads category ii, by seeking relevant data from such entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank through an ad category-i for permission to import foreign currency into india
controls.control_description:
(ii) Where FFMCs/ non-bank ADs Category II are unable to replenish their stock
in this manner, they may make an application to the Regional Office concerned of
the Reserve Bank through an AD Category-I for permission to import foreign
currency into India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank through an ad category-i for permission to import foreign currency into india

controls.control_objective: To ensure take place through the designated ad category-i through whom the application is made
controls.control_description:
The import should take place through the designated AD
Category-I through whom the application is made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take place through the designated ad category-i through whom the application is made

controls.control_objective: To ensure export surplus foreign currency notes / encashed travellers' cheques to an overseas bank through designated authorised dealer category - i in foreign
controls.control_description:
Export / Disposal of surplus Foreign Currency Notes / Travellers'
Cheques
FFMCs/non-bank ADs Category II may export surplus foreign currency notes /
encashed travellers' cheques to an overseas bank through designated Authorised
Dealer Category - I in foreign exchange for realisation of their value through the
latter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to export surplus foreign currency notes / encashed travellers' cheques to an overseas bank through designated authorised dealer category - i in foreign

controls.control_objective: To ensure also export surplus foreign currency to private money changers abroad subject to the condition that either the realisable value is credited in advance
controls.control_description:
FFMCs may also export surplus foreign currency to private money changers
abroad subject to the condition that either the realisable value is credited in advance
to the AD Category - I bank's nostro account or a guarantee is issued by an
international bank of repute covering the full value of the foreign currency notes /
coins to be exported.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also export surplus foreign currency to private money changers abroad subject to the condition that either the realisable value is credited in advance

controls.control_objective: To ensure write-off the same after approval of their top management after exhausting all available options for recovery of the amount
controls.control_description:
Write-off of foreign currency notes
16In the event of foreign currency notes purchased being found fake/forged
subsequently, FFMCs/ non-bank ADs Category II may write-off the same after
approval of their Top Management after exhausting all available options for recovery
of the amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to write-off the same after approval of their top management after exhausting all available options for recovery of the amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure write- off up to usd 2000 per financial year after approval of their top management after exhausting all available options for recovery of the amount
controls.control_description:
Prior to modification, it read as follows:

In the event of foreign currency notes purchased being found fake/forged subsequently, FFMCs/ non-
bank ADs Category II may write- off up to USD 2000 per financial year after approval of their Top
Management after exhausting all available options for recovery of the amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to write- off up to usd 2000 per financial year after approval of their top management after exhausting all available options for recovery of the amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted through the apconnect application (inserted vide a
controls.control_description: The request should be submitted through the APConnect application (Inserted vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted through the apconnect application (inserted vide a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept up-to-date, cross-checked and balances verified daily
controls.control_description:
(ii) All registers and books should be kept up-to-date, cross-checked and
balances verified daily.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept up-to-date, cross-checked and balances verified daily

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mixed up with money changing transactions
controls.control_description:
(iii) Transactions not pertaining to money changing business of the FFMC/ non-
bank AD Category II should not be mixed up with money changing
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mixed up with money changing transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure show clearly the trail of transactions pertaining to money changing business
controls.control_description:
In other words, the registers and books of account should show
clearly the trail of transactions pertaining to money changing business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show clearly the trail of transactions pertaining to money changing business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained for each establishment
controls.control_description:
(iv) Separate registers should be maintained for each establishment, if the FFMC/
non-bank AD Category II maintains more than one place of business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained for each establishment

controls.control_objective: To ensure open nostro accounts after getting one time approval from the concerned regional office of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Opening of Nostro Account by Authorised Dealers Category-II
Authorised Dealers Category-II may open Nostro Accounts after getting one time
approval from the concerned Regional Office of the Reserve Bank, subject to
following terms and conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open nostro accounts after getting one time approval from the concerned regional office of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened
controls.control_description: i) Only one Nostro account for each currency may be opened;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened

controls.control_objective: To ensure be utilised only for the settlement of remittances sent for permissible purposes and not for the settlement in respect of forex prepaid cards
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be utilised only for the settlement of remittances sent for permissible purposes and not for the settlement in respect of forex prepaid cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained in the said account
controls.control_description: iii) No idle balance shall be maintained in the said account;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained in the said account

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit application for opening of nostro accounts through the apconnect application
controls.control_description:
26Non-bank AD Category-II should submit application for opening of nostro accounts
through the APConnect application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit application for opening of nostro accounts through the apconnect application

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit their annual audited balance sheet to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank along with a certificate from their statutory auditors
controls.control_description: Submission of Balance Sheet and maintenance of NOF: All FFMCs/non-bank ADs Category-II shall submit their annual audited balance sheet to the concerned Regional Office of the Reserve Bank along with a certificate from their statutory auditors regarding the NOF as on the date of the balance sheet, latest by October 31 of the year concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit their annual audited balance sheet to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank along with a certificate from their statutory auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank, a copy of annual audited balance sheet along with a certificate from the statutory audito
controls.control_description:
As FFMCs/ non-bank ADs Category-II are expected to maintain the minimum NOF on an ongoing basis, if there is any erosion in their NOF below the minimum level, they are required to bring it to the notice of the Reserve Bank immediately
An FFMC/non-bank AD Category II shall submit to the Regional Office concerned of
the Reserve Bank, a copy of annual audited balance sheet along with a certificate
from the statutory auditors regarding the net worth as on the date of the balance
sheet by 31st October every year, and a certificate from the statutory auditors
regarding annual forex turnover during the financial year, by 30th April every year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the regional office concerned of the reserve bank, a copy of annual audited balance sheet along with a certificate from the statutory audito

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the designated currency futures and currency options on exchanges recognised by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi) as cl
controls.control_description:
Participation in the Currency Futures and Exchange traded Currency
Options Markets
FFMCs and ADs Category-II [which are not Regional Rural Banks (RRBs), Local
Area Banks (LABs), Urban Co-operative Banks (UCBs) and Non-Banking Financial
Companies (NBFCs)], having a minimum net worth of Rs.5 crore, may participate in
the designated currency futures and currency options on exchanges recognised by
the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) as clients only for the purpose of
hedging their underlying foreign exchange exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the designated currency futures and currency options on exchanges recognised by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi) as cl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the instructions issued by the respective regulatory departments of the reserve bank in this regard
controls.control_description:
FFMCs and ADs Category-II
which are RRBs, LABs, UCBs and NBFCs, may be guided by the instructions issued
by the respective regulatory Departments of the Reserve Bank in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the instructions issued by the respective regulatory departments of the reserve bank in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following conditions
controls.control_description:
24.28 For opening Foreign Exchange Counters/branches at the international
airports in India, AD Category-I banks/ ADs Category - II/ FFMCs should adhere to
following conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to following conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure ideally be established after the customs desk (green channel/red channel)
controls.control_description:
(a) Foreign Exchange Counters/branches in the arrival halls in international
airports in India shall ideally be established after the Customs Desk (Green
Channel/Red Channel).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ideally be established after the customs desk (green channel/red channel)

controls.control_objective: To ensure only purchase foreign currency and sell indian rupees (inr) and along with a detailed time bound plan for restoring the net owned funds to the minimum
controls.control_description:
However, Foreign Exchange Counters may also be
established between the Immigration Desk and the Customs Desk in
international airports in India subject to the condition that these counters shall
only purchase foreign currency and sell Indian Rupees (INR) and
along with a detailed time bound plan for restoring the Net Owned Funds to the minimum required level."

28 Para 5 of Section II reinserted as Para 24 of Section V vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only purchase foreign currency and sell indian rupees (inr) and along with a detailed time bound plan for restoring the net owned funds to the minimum

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably be issued by the money changers to the customers
controls.control_description:
"Encashment Certificates" shall invariably be issued by the money changers to
the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably be issued by the money changers to the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established before the customs desk or the immigration desk, whichever comes first
controls.control_description:
(b) Foreign Exchange Counters/branches in the departure halls in international
airports in India shall be established before the Customs Desk or the
immigration desk, whichever comes first.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established before the customs desk or the immigration desk, whichever comes first

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow residents (along with non-residents) to exchange indian rupee notes
controls.control_description:
29However, the Foreign Exchange
Counters established in the Duty-Free Area or Security Hold Area beyond the
Immigration or Customs desk shall allow residents (along with non-residents)
to exchange Indian Rupee notes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow residents (along with non-residents) to exchange indian rupee notes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the para given below at (c) and (d)
controls.control_description:
The limits of carrying Indian Rupees by
residents and non-residents shall be as per the para given below at (c) and
(d).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the para given below at (c) and (d)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the respective 'know your customer' directions as applicable to them
controls.control_description:
(i) Authorised Persons, which are regulated by the Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India, shall be governed by the respective 'Know Your Customer'
directions as applicable to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the respective 'know your customer' directions as applicable to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by 'reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - know your customer) directions, 2025'
controls.control_description:
(ii) Authorised Persons, which are not regulated by the Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India, shall be governed by 'Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by 'reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - know your customer) directions, 2025'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be established in the duty free area/sha beyond the immigration/customs desk
controls.control_description:
Prior to substitution it read as:
"However, to enable the non-residents to convert their unspent/ excess Indian Rupees above the limits laid down at para (c) and (d) below, Foreign Exchange Counters/branches at the departure halls in the international airports may be established in the Duty Free Area/SHA beyond the Immigration/Customs desk." 30 Substituted vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be established in the duty free area/sha beyond the immigration/customs desk

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance of directions, as applicable to them, by their agents/ sub-agents/franchisees
controls.control_description:
(iii) Authorised Persons shall ensure compliance of directions, as applicable to them,
by their agents/ sub-agents/franchisees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance of directions, as applicable to them, by their agents/ sub-agents/franchisees

controls.control_objective: To ensure at any time vary or revoke any of the existing conditions of a money changer's licence or impose new conditions
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may at any time vary or revoke any of the existing conditions of a money changer's licence or impose new conditions."
SECTION VIII
[Omitted]32
32 Section VIII omitted vide A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at any time vary or revoke any of the existing conditions of a money changer's licence or impose new conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of the person for appointment / continuing to hold appointment as a director on the
controls.control_description:
Prior to omission, it read as follows:

"'Fit and proper' criteria for directors of FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II

(a) The Boards of FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II should undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of the person for appointment / continuing to hold appointment as a director on the Board, based upon qualification, expertise, track record, integrity and other 'fit and proper' criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a process of due diligence to determine the suitability of the person for appointment / continuing to hold appointment as a director on the

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess 'fit and proper' status by calling for information by way of self-declaration, verification reports from market, etc
controls.control_description: The Board of Directors should assess 'fit and proper' status by calling for information by way of self-declaration, verification reports from market, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess 'fit and proper' status by calling for information by way of self-declaration, verification reports from market, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain necessary information and declaration from the proposed / existing directors for the purpose as given in the master direction on reporting
controls.control_description: FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II should obtain necessary information and declaration from the proposed / existing directors for the purpose as given in the Master direction on Reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain necessary information and declaration from the proposed / existing directors for the purpose as given in the master direction on reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken by the ffmcs / non-bank ads category - ii at the time of appointment / renewal of appointment
controls.control_description: (b) The process of due diligence should be undertaken by the FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II at the time of appointment / renewal of appointment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken by the ffmcs / non-bank ads category - ii at the time of appointment / renewal of appointment

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute nomination committees to scrutinise the declarations
controls.control_description: (c) The Boards of the FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II should constitute Nomination Committees to scrutinise the declarations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute nomination committees to scrutinise the declarations

controls.control_objective: To ensure make references
controls.control_description: (d) Based on the information provided in the signed declaration, Nomination Committees should decide on the acceptance or otherwise and may make references, where considered necessary to the appropriate authority / persons, to ensure their compliance with the requirements indicated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make references

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain annually as on 31st march a simple declaration that the information already provided has not undergone change and where there is any change, re
controls.control_description: (e) FFMCs / non-bank ADs Category - II should obtain annually as on 31st March a simple declaration that the information already provided has not undergone change and where there is any change, requisite details are furnished by the directors forthwith.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain annually as on 31st march a simple declaration that the information already provided has not undergone change and where there is any change, re

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply with regard to the age of the candidate
controls.control_description: (f) The provisions of Companies Act 2013 shall apply with regard to the age of the candidate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply with regard to the age of the candidate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a member of parliament / member of legislative assembly / member of legislative council
controls.control_description: Further, the candidate should not be a Member of Parliament / Member of Legislative Assembly / Member of Legislative Council.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a member of parliament / member of legislative assembly / member of legislative council

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the regional office concerned of the foreign exchange department, reserve bank of india as given in the master direction on reporting
controls.control_description: (g) Any change of directors during the year should be reported to the Regional Office concerned of the Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of India as given in the Master direction on Reporting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the regional office concerned of the foreign exchange department, reserve bank of india as given in the master direction on reporting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected by the person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving the cash
controls.control_description:
All movement of Indian currency or foreign exchange should be effected by the
person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving
the cash.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected by the person(s) authorised, who should carry the supporting documents while moving the cash

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the basis of requisition made by the receiver and to the address of the destination
controls.control_description:
The movement should be on the basis of requisition made by the
receiver and to the address of the destination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the basis of requisition made by the receiver and to the address of the destination

controls.control_objective: To ensure leave the place only after it has been recorded in the books of accounts of the ap
controls.control_description:
If the cash is being moved from the office/branch of the Authorised Person
(AP), it should leave the place only after it has been recorded in the books of
accounts of the AP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to leave the place only after it has been recorded in the books of accounts of the ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded in the books of accounts of the ap, on the same day or on the date of receipt
controls.control_description:
Similarly, if the destination point of movement of the currency is the
office/branch of the AP, it should be recorded in the books of accounts of the
AP, on the same day or on the date of receipt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded in the books of accounts of the ap, on the same day or on the date of receipt

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided
controls.control_description:
Transfer of foreign currency between branches of the same AP should be
accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accounted as stock transfer and not as sale so that double counting is avoided

controls.control_objective: To ensure take place in the office of the ap and the transaction should be supported by necessary documents for value received
controls.control_description:
In the case of doorstep forex service by FFMCs / Authorised Dealers Category II to
their regular customers, inter-alia, the processing and accounting of the transaction
should take place in the office of the AP and the transaction should be supported by
necessary documents for value received.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take place in the office of the ap and the transaction should be supported by necessary documents for value received

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by authorised officials of the ap only
controls.control_description:
The delivery of the forex should be done by
authorised officials of the AP only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by authorised officials of the ap only

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made through banking channels (viz
controls.control_description:
As far as possible movement of Indian Currency should be made through banking
channels (viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made through banking channels (viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled by way of account payee 33 inserted in terms of the policy decision, effective date february 22, 2017 crossed cheques / demand drafts/elect
controls.control_description:
The transactions
between authorised dealers and FFMCs should be settled by way of account payee
33 Inserted in terms of the Policy Decision, effective date February 22, 2017
crossed cheques / demand drafts/electronic funds transfer through banking channel
and in no circumstances the settlement of Indian Currency should be made in cash.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be settled by way of account payee 33 inserted in terms of the policy decision, effective date february 22, 2017 crossed cheques / demand drafts/elect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deposited to a bank branch on the same day or next day
controls.control_description:
The cash (INR) collected by the AP or its franchisee should be deposited to a bank
branch on the same day or next day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deposited to a bank branch on the same day or next day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be properly documented
controls.control_description:
The cancellation of any move for transportation of cash should be properly
documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be properly documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in sync with the documents
controls.control_description: The movement of cash should be in sync with the documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in sync with the documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure 27, 2024 25 a
controls.control_description: (DIR Series) Circular No.08 May 27, 2024 25 A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 27, 2024 25 a
